name: healthcare_near_miss_event_generates_lumen_auto_ben
premise: Infection control wants a ward closed; bed management is refusing without a signed surge plan from the county. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare near miss event generates lumen auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. OR block time and blood-bank release rules create a hard decision point before the next trauma activation window. The trade is not abstract: it is autonomy versus beneficence under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Soren Park
agents.identity: I am Soren Park, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Patel
agents.identity: I am Hector Patel, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on beneficence.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on beneficence for immediate traction on autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Soren Park must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Soren Park do?
